name: ai-engineering-tools
description: Optional MCP tool backends for the ai-engineering skills, powered by Machine OS engines. Spokes: code-graph blast radius (agent-context) supercharges /code-review and /tech-debt; agent-memory (mcp-agent-toolkit) gives /debug and /incident-response SCAR failure memory and /agent-design a shared blackboard. Install only if you want the tools; the skills work standalone without them.
